description: RCT of Indomethacin for Prevention of Post-ERCP Pancreatitis
proposed_title: Indomethacin RCT for Post-ERCP Pancreatitis Prevention (2012)
encoding_note: outcome=1_yes → success (pancreatitis occurred); rx: 1_indomethacin vs 0_placebo; stratum by gender (1_female/2_male) or SOD type column. Count rows where outcome=1_yes as Successes, total rows as Cases per (rx × gender) cell.
